home.name: Your Name
home.description: I build clean, scalable, and purposeful digital experiences.

about.title: About me
about.bio: I'm a software developer passionate about crafting elegant solutions to complex problems. I specialize in modern web development with a focus on user experience and code quality.
about.doingText: I design and implement full-stack web applications, RESTful APIs, and scalable systems. I enjoy maintaining clean, well-documented code aligned with industry best practices.

rosario.description: Development and maintenance of internal platforms for the university. Building user interfaces with React and TypeScript, integrating REST APIs, and collaborating with academic teams to digitize administrative processes.
responsibilities: Development of academic management modules with React and PHP
Integration with Node.js backend services and PostgreSQL databases
Participation in code reviews and definition of coding standards
Coordination with stakeholders for requirements gathering

omia.description: Web project development for clients across different sectors. From landing pages to full web applications, always with an emphasis on performance and responsive design.
responsibilities: Development of landing pages and corporate websites
Implementation of online stores with shopping cart functionality
Direct client management and project delivery

items.name: Project Alpha
items.description: Task management platform with authentication, Kanban boards and real-time notifications.

items.name: DataViz Dashboard
items.description: Interactive dashboard for business metrics visualization with dynamic charts and report export.

items.name: API Gateway
items.description: Authentication and authorization microservice with JWT, rate limiting and centralized logging.

items.name: E-Commerce UI
items.description: Online store interface with product catalog, shopping cart and integrated payment gateway.
